descriptions.title: Customs Clearance. MVD airport.
paragraphs: Includes our charges, our customs agent's charges and MGAP´s fees.
It does not include the Uurguay Customs´ import tax for the animal´s import.
Quoted based on arrivals from Monday to Friday until 1:30 pm. Extra charges will apply on after hour and weekends.

descriptions.title: Import taxes in Uruguay
paragraphs: 35% of the CIF value is a must and will apply.

descriptions.title: Home delivery in Montevideo
paragraphs: Pick up from MVD airport and delivery to owner´s residence in Montevideo metro.
a This price does not include cost of insurance of the animal.
b Prices charged by third parties may vary, in which case we will inform if there are
any variation in the customer´s charges.
c Payment: 100% in advance, 15 days prior to shipment.
